ksa_text: Knowledge of ML platform components and pipeline orchestration, including feature stores, model registries, experiment tracking systems, model serving infrastructure, and the architectural trade-offs between managed and self-hosted ML platforms.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI risks and benefits from third-party entities are managed.

top_anchors.element_label: AI risks and benefits from third-party entities are managed.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain AI/ML Engineering KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.427) to justify inclusion for the VP Data Engineering. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: This Knowledge KSA was excluded as an edge case, yet it has a composite score of 0.427 (moderate signal). Knowledge-dimension KSAs represent conceptual awareness rather than execution; exclusion may be too aggressive.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Edge-domain Knowledge KSAs require more than moderate signal to justify inclusion; the role's scope does not regularly engage with AI/ML Engineering. Exclusion upheld.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Upheld: edge-domain exclusion maintained. AI/ML Engineering is not sufficiently central to the VP Data Engineering to warrant inclusion at this signal level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world VP Data Engineering roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Recent job postings for VP Data Engineering roles increasingly include AI/ML Engineering competencies as organizations broaden role scope. External evidence supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: evolving market expectations for VP Data Engineering now include AI/ML Engineering competencies. Revised to include.

decision_rationale: Initially excluded but overturned through adversarial review. AI/ML Engineering knowledge KSA is relevant to the VP Data Engineering based on external evidence and internal consistency re-evaluation.
